setup: Ensure ngrok is running and forwarding to localhost:8000
Configure Retell AI agent with your ngrok URL
Verify OpenAI API key is configured in .env
execution: Input each user message from the conversation flow
validation_criteria: Predictions are within expected confidence ranges
Voice responses are natural and clear
